name: Brian Posehn
bio: Brian Posehn is an American stand-up comedian, actor, writer, and musician whose deadpan, self-deprecating persona trades in heavy metal, nerd culture, marijuana, and graphic absurdism. He emerged from the San Francisco alternative scene and HBO sketch series Mr. Show with Bob and David, then built a stand-up career across four comedy albums and several specials. He is also widely known for screen roles on The Sarah Silverman Program and The Big Bang Theory.

timeline.ev: Joins HBO sketch series Mr. Show with Bob and David
Tapes Comedy Central Presents half-hour special
Releases debut comedy album Live In: Nerd Rage
Releases The Fartist special and begins recurring role on The Big Bang Theory

accolades: Two Primetime Emmy nominations for writing on Mr. Show with Bob and David (1998, 1999)
Featured in The Comedians of Comedy tour and documentary
Author of Marvel's Deadpool ongoing comic series (2012 to 2015)
